div.style: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:99999; background:rgba(0,0,0,.75); align-items:center; justify-content:center;
background:#fff; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; width:460px; box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
text-align:center; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; padding:8px 16px 0; color:#6c757d; letter-spacing:.3px;

div.div: Coloca tu rostro dentro del óvalo

video.style: width:100%; border-radius:12px; background:#000; transform-origin:center center; transition:transform .2s;

svg.style: position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none;

button.name: create_employee_from_applicant
button.invisible: emp_id or not active or not date_closed or status_stage_id != 7

div.invisible: process != 'progress' or status_stage_id == 1 or status_stage_id == 7 or status_stage_id == 8

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.title: En progreso
widget.invisible: status_stage_id == 0 or status_stage_id == 1 or status_stage_id == 7 or status_stage_id == 8

div.invisible: process != 'progress' or status_stage_id == 1 or status_stage_id == 7 or status_stage_id == 8

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.title: En progreso
widget.invisible: status_stage_id == 0 or status_stage_id == 1 or status_stage_id == 7 or status_stage_id == 8

div.class: oe_title pe-0 border border-light-p border-5 px-4 py-4 pe-4

div.style: display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; overflow:hidden; width:100%; margin-top:6px;

span.style: display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;
display:inline-flex; align-items:baseline; gap:3px; background:#f1f3f4; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.4;

div.class: border pe-0 border-light-p border-5 px-4 py-4 pe-4 scrollable-div

table.class: table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2

label.string: Me gustaría recibir ofertas de empleo acordes a mi perfil

table.class: table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2
table table-bordered o_group border mb-0 mt-2

button.name: request_complement
button.invisible: status_stage_id != 5 or resend_complement == True or process == 'no_viable'

button.name: request_complement
button.invisible: status_stage_id != 5 or resend_complement == False or process == 'no_viable'

div.class: p-3 border border-light-p border-5 border-start-0 border-end-0

div.t-attf-class: {{'oe_kanban_color_' + kanban_getcolor(record.color_process.raw_value) + ' oe_kanban_color_' + record.process.raw_value }} oe_kanban_card oe_kanban_global_click oe_applicant_kanban oe_semantic_html_override
